credentials.title: Credentials
credentials.nocred:
You have no saved credentials.
Add one to start using the Wallet.
credentials.nocred-subtitle: Scan a QR code or accept a credential offer to get started.
credentials.expiredText: This credential has expired and you can no longer use it.
credentials.confirmationMessage: Do you want to choose this credential?

home.install-hint: Install the app for a better experience

camera-logs.title: Camera logs
camera-logs.no-more-logs: No more camera logs to load.

mailto_permission_alert: Si us plau, assegura't que tens els permisos necessaris per enviar correus electrònics amb la teva aplicació de correu predeterminada. Si el servei de correu no s’obre, és probable que sigui a causa de restriccions de permisos.

login.title: Welcome back
login.subtitle: Use your passkey to sign in securely

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Enter your email to get started
register.code-sent: We sent a verification code to your email
register.passkey-subtitle: Create a passkey to set up your wallet securely
register.install-subtitle: For the best experience and offline access, install the wallet app on your device.

passkey.title: Set up Passkey
passkey.description: Create a passkey to sign in securely without a password. Your device will use biometrics or a PIN to verify your identity.

vc-selector.title: Vc Selector
vc-selector.server-error-message:
We couldn't process your request.
Please try again later.
vc-selector.credential-revoke-message: The credential provided is invalid, it has been revoked or is not valid for this operation

vc-view.warning-msg: By generating this code, you agree that the data contained in your permit, and its legal status, will be displayed on the reader device to verify its validity.
vc-view.delete-header: Are you sure to delete this credential?
vc-view.delete-message: If you delete the credential from the app and need to recover it, you will need to request a new one.
vc-view.unsigned-message: Your credential has not yet been signed and cannot be used. Wait for the issuer to complete the signing process.

errors.default: Something went wrong. If it keeps happening, please contact the support team.
errors.key-storage-unavailable: This browser can’t securely store keys. You won’t be able to activate or use credentials on this device.
errors.key-storage-public-only: This browser can’t securely store keys. You can add credentials, but they may stop working after you close or reload the app.
errors.credential-validation-failed: We couldn’t validate the credential. Please try again.
errors.invalid-issuerMetadata: We couldn’t read the issuer information.
errors.cannot-download-auth-server-metadata: We couldn’t reach the authorization server. Please try again.
errors.cannot-download-issuerMetadata: We couldn’t reach the issuer. Please try again.
errors.cannot-download-credentialOffer: We couldn’t download the credential offer. Please try again.
errors.invalid-credential-configuration: This offer contains an invalid credential configuration.
errors.unsupported-credential-format: This credential type isn’t supported by this wallet.
errors.invalid-jwt: We received an invalid credential token.
errors.browser-compatibility-check-failed: We couldn’t check if your browser is compatible. Please try again.
errors.secure-storage-open-failed: We couldn’t open secure storage on this device. Please try again.
errors.secure-storage-blocked-by-another-tab: Another tab is using secure storage. Close other tabs of this app and try again.
errors.browser-storage-full: Your browser storage is full. Free up space and try again.
errors.browser-storage-operation-failed: Secure storage failed. Please try again.
errors.signing-key-not-found: We couldn’t find the key for this credential on this browser. Please make sure you are using the same browser and device where you added the credential, and try again.
errors.private-key-not-available: We couldn’t find the key for this credential on this browser. Please make sure you are using the same browser and device where you added the credential, and try again.
errors.key-not-found: We couldn’t find the key for this credential on this browser. Please make sure you are using the same browser and device where you added the credential, and try again.
errors.private-key-non-extractable: This key can’t be exported from the device.
errors.unsupported-algorithm: This security feature isn’t supported on this device.
errors.invalid-public-jwk: We couldn't find a valid public key for this credential on this browser. Please make sure you are using the same browser and device where you added the credential, and try again.
errors.unsupported-key-type: This key type isn’t supported. Please try again.
errors.unsupported-curve: This key curve isn’t supported. Please try again.
errors.invalid-auth-server-metadata: The authorization server information is invalid.
errors.cannot-get-access-token: We couldn’t sign you in to the issuer. Please try again.
errors.invalid-token-response: We received an invalid response from the issuer.
errors.pin-timeout: Time ran out to enter the PIN. Please try again.
errors.cannot-open-pin-prompt: We couldn’t open the PIN screen. Please try again.
errors.network-error: A network error occurred. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.invalid-request: The request was invalid. Please try again.
errors.not-authorized: You are not authorized to perform this action. Please check your credentials and try again.
errors.resource-not-found: The requested resource was not found. Please try again.
errors.server-error: The server encountered an error. Please try again later.
errors.verifier-post-failed: We couldn’t send the login response. Please try again.
errors.signature-failed: We couldn’t sign the presentation. Please try again.
errors.failed-qr-process:
We couldn't process the QR code.
It might be invalid or already used. Please refresh it. If the problem persists, report it to the support team.
errors.invalid-qr: The presented QR code is not valid
errors.no-credentials-available: There are no credentials available to login
errors.expired-credentialOffer: The credential offer is expired or already used. Please refresh and try again later, or contact your company's LEAR to get a new credential.
errors.cannot-get-VC: Issuer credential could not be obtained
errors.cannot-save-VC: The credential could not be saved successfully
errors.incorrect-pin: Incorrect PIN. Please refresh the credential offer. If the problem persists, report it to the support team.
errors.pin-expired: You didn't enter the PIN within the time limit. Please refresh the credential offer. If the problem persists, report it to the support team.
errors.qr-expired: The QR session has expired. Please refresh the credential offer.
errors.unsigned: The signed credential is not yet available
errors.loading-VCs: There was an error loading credentials. Please try again. If the problem persists, report it to the support team.
errors.no-connection: Connection was lost. Please check your network and try again.
errors.navigation: There was an unexpected problem when trying to access the page. If the problem persists, report it to the support team.

camera.not-readable: The camera cannot be accessed. Make sure no other application is using it. You may need to refresh the page.
camera.not-allowed: Camera access is denied. Check your browser permissions. If the issue persists, try refreshing the page.
camera.not-found: Camera not found on this device. Make sure it is properly connected and refresh the page.
camera.overconstrained: The camera configuration is not compatible. Try selecting a different camera or refreshing the page.
camera.security: Camera access is blocked due to security restrictions. You may need to refresh the page or check your browser settings.
camera.abort: Camera access was aborted. Check your browser permissions and make sure no other application is using the camera. Try again or refresh the page.
camera.type: Configuration error: the camera request is invalid. Try refreshing the page or checking your camera settings
camera.not-supported: Your browser does not support camera access. Consider using a different browser.
camera.default: Unexpected error. Check your browser permissions and make sure no other application is using the camera. Try refreshing the page.

activity.title: Activity
activity.empty-hint: Your credential activity will appear here

devices.title: My Devices
devices.subtitle: Manage the passkeys registered to your account
devices.delete-message: Are you sure you want to delete this passkey? If this is the passkey for your current device, you will not be able to sign in from this browser anymore.
devices.last-passkey-error: You cannot delete your last passkey. Register a new device first.
devices.load-error: Could not load your devices. Please try again.

confirmation.new-credential: Do you want to accept this credential?
confirmation.description: A PIN has been sent to your email. Check your inbox. Enter your PIN Code.
